fields.label: Source type
fields.rationale: DocType aggregation is the common case for KPI-style charts. Use Report when the user explicitly wants to plot an existing Report's output.

fields.label: Report name (when source=Report)
fields.rationale: Required when source=Report. Names an existing Report in the site. Empty for DocType source.

fields.label: DocType (when source=DocType)
fields.rationale: Required when source=DocType. Names the DocType to aggregate. Empty for Report source.

fields.label: Chart type
fields.rationale: Bar is a safe default for categorical data. Line fits time-series, Pie and Donut fit distributions under ~6 categories, Heatmap fits per-day density.

fields.label: Timespan
fields.rationale: Last Year balances meaningful trend signal with query cost. Users can narrow to shorter spans.

fields.label: Date field to group by (time-based charts)
fields.rationale: For Line / Bar charts on DocType source, names the date field driving the X axis (e.g. posting_date). Empty for non-time-series.

fields.label: Numeric field to aggregate
fields.rationale: For Sum / Average / Min / Max aggregations on DocType source, names the numeric field. Empty when counting rows (set aggregate_function_based_on separately for Count).

fields.label: Grouping
fields.rationale: Count is the safe default for categorical summaries. Sum / Average require a numeric value_based_on.
